news_results.description: Tim Stutzle's status is in the air as the Ottawa Senators return to the ice from the Olympic break. The 24-year-old forward is a game-time decision for Thursday's game against the Detroit Red Wings as he deals with an illness, Sportsnet's Alex Adams reported.
